subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Praise be to God, the musk-laden breeze hath spread its amber-scented fragrance across the world, and the fame of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی الحمد لله نفحه مشکبار جهان را عنبر بار نموده و صیت جمال مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @universal peace; world unity, @martyrs and martyrdom
